metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_205
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Analyses of highly purified synaptic vesicles by mass spectrometry indicates that Rab8B co-purifiies with synaptic vesicles. However, using the distribution of EGFP-Rab8B in hippocampal neurons as visualised by immunofluorescence microscopy does not support enrichment on synaptic vesicles. Together with results from Takamori et al and Wilhelm et al, this suggests that Rab8B is present at presynaptic terminals but not on synaptic vesicles.. Experimental description: Legend to Table 1 "Complete survey of the rat SV Rabome"

27/3/2017 Pim:
- Personal communication with the authors (John Chua of, at that time, the Jahn Lab) informed us that the species of the pEGFP-Rab8B construct was Canis Lupus (wolf).
- Based on the data presented in Table.1 on SV localizaton annotation is made against the rat species.
